content:
# Particle Size Distribution

**Summary**: The distribution of different particle sizes within a sample.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] analyzed the particle size distribution to assess proppant degradation after testing.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] Used to quantify the extent of proppant crushing and degradation during flow tests.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024]] Determined using a Camsizer X2 device.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- 40/70 sand produced 65.18% fines smaller than 212 microns post-experiment, while RCS only produced 14.08%. ([[2024-suleiman-5|Suleiman, 2024, p. 46]])
